cmake -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug -DCMAKE_MAKE_PROGRAM=make -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=gcc -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=g++ -G "Unix Makefiles" -DCMAKE_CXX_FLAGS=--coverage -DCMAKE_C_FLAGS=--coverage -S "/home/igor/Documentos/[08] Projetos/[16]_DW_Decomp/VRPTW" -B "/home/igor/Documentos/[08] Projetos/[16]_DW_Decomp/VRPTW/cmake-build-debug-coverage"
set vector_sanity_check=1
